title: PM Lane 176 - Local Approval Submission Dry Run Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power approval dry-run scan burden by grouping the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel without changing dry-run builders, export handlers, filenames, payloads, no-request behavior, disclosure behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run readiness checkpoint, future route/local draft gate/write boundary cards, and local artifact actions into Dry Run Readiness Context, Future Request Boundary Context, and Local Artifact Actions Context.

Preserved the same dry-run envelope builder, readiness checkpoint export, review bundle export, live-gate preflight export, clear behavior, preview/status behavior, filenames, payload versions, no-request posture, and no-write language.
Kept the local approval submission dry run disclosure behavior stateless with no approval-dry-run disclosure localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape and smoke hardening while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 176|Approval dry run groups|Dry Run Readiness Context approval dry run group|Future Request Boundary Context approval dry run group|Local Artifact Actions Context approval dry run group|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; operations-web build passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 176 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Laplace independently recommended the exact three groups used here, emphasized wrapper-only JSX, and recommended smoke assertions for group count, readiness cards, boundary cards, exact local artifact button order, preserved download payloads, no disclosure storage, and mutationRequests length 0.
